policies.title: Shipping Policy
policies.content:
At Valliani Jewelers, we strive to provide you with exceptional service for a seamless shopping experience.

Shipping Methods and Costs
We offer multiple shipping options to meet your needs.
Standard Shipping: Delivery Time: 5–7 business days.
Expedited Shipping: Delivery Time: 2–3 business days.
Free shipping across the United States.

Order Processing
Orders are processed Monday through Friday. Orders placed after 4 PM on Friday, or on weekends and holidays, will be processed on the next business day.

Shipping Confirmation
Once your order is shipped, you will receive a confirmation email with tracking details, allowing you to monitor your package until it arrives.

Signature Requirement
To ensure secure delivery, all orders require a customer signature upon receipt.

Shipping Restrictions
We ship only to street addresses and cannot deliver to P.O. Boxes or APO/FPO addresses. Please provide a valid street address to avoid any delays.

International Shipping
Currently, Valliani Jewelers ships exclusively within the United States. We are working to expand our shipping services to international destinations soon.

Handling Time
Handling time refers to the preparation period for shipment. Orders are typically processed within 1–5 business days, provided items are in stock and payment verification is complete.

Delivery Issues
If you experience delivery issues, such as delays or lost packages, please contact our customer service team immediately.

Contact Information
Email: orders@vallianijewelers.com
Phone: 1-844-OVANI-104
Address: 302 Great Mall Drive, Milpitas, CA 95035, USA

We've Got You Covered
Free Shipping Across US | 30-Day Returns Online Only | 24/7 Support

policies.title: Returns & Refunds Policy
policies.content:
We want you to be absolutely satisfied with your order. If you are not fully happy, you may return it within 30 days of receipt for a refund or exchange.

Returns & Exchanges
If you are not satisfied with your purchase, you may exchange it within a week of purchase. Exchanges can be made by shipping the item back to us or visiting any of our local stores. Initial shipping is free; however, shipping charges may apply for exchanges.
Unworn and unaltered watches with original packaging and documents can be exchanged within weekdays. Watch warranties are provided by the manufacturers. Watches cannot be exchanged for jewelry pieces.

Condition & Exclusions
All products must be returned in the original condition. Special orders, customized items (sized, engraved, etc.), or used merchandise are not eligible for refund.
Free gifts included with your purchase must be returned alongside the item. Returns missing any free gift, original packaging, or documentation cannot be refunded.
This online policy applies only to web purchases and does not alter our in-store return or exchange guidelines.

How To Prepare Your Return
Package your item securely and ship to:
Valliani Jewelers
302 Great Mall Drive
Milpitas, CA 95035
Include all original packaging, certificates, and appraisals. Please insure your shipment for its full value.

Our Return Process
Once received and inspected by our Quality Assurance team, refunds or exchanges will be processed within a few days.
Items showing wear, or those that have been engraved, resized, altered, or damaged cannot be accepted for return.

We've Got You Covered
Free Shipping Across US | 30-Day Returns Online Only | 24/7 Support

policies.title: Financing & Payment Options
policies.content:
Valliani Jewelers offers flexible financing so you can bring home the jewelry you love with payments that fit your budget.

Financing Partners
We work with trusted financing providers at checkout:
Acima — lease-to-own financing with flexible payment plans.
Affirm — buy now, pay later with transparent monthly payments.
Authorize.net — secure payment processing for online orders.

How It Works
Select your jewelry online or visit any Valliani Jewelers store. At checkout, choose a financing option to see if you qualify. Approval and terms depend on the provider and may vary by purchase amount.

Questions
For help with financing or payment options, contact us:
Email: orders@vallianijewelers.com
Phone: 1-844-OVANI-104

We've Got You Covered
Free Shipping Across US | 30-Day Returns Online Only | 24/7 Support
